data.current_description: Creates a new candidate invitation through the Zapier integration.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new candidate invitation for a specified candidate through the Zapier integration. Accepts candidate details via CandidateInvitationRequest (email, name, etc.). Returns a CandidateInvitationResponse containing the invitation ID, status, and creation timestamp. The invitation is immediately sent to the candidate upon creation.

data.current_description: Validates the provided session token and returns session information.
data.description_suggestion: Validates an active session token and returns session information. Requires the session token to be provided via the sessionToken security scheme.
